title: quercus trojana subsp. yaltirikii
intro: Quercus trojana subsp. yaltirikii, also known as Turkish white oak, is a subspecies of tree found in the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Quercus trojana subsp. yaltirikii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as extracts and tinctures, are used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like fever, arthritis, and digestive issues.
